extension.summary: Skip intros and show the next-episode prompt with online metadata or chapter timing.
extension.description: Adds two lightweight playback helpers to Kodi: Skip Intro and Next On. The add-on can use online metadata from TheIntroDB and IntroDB.app, fall back to local chapter markers when needed, and optionally use manual timing settings for intro skipping. It keeps the on-screen experience minimal with simple overlay buttons.
